fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 42-year-old African American male with schizophrenia with residual symptoms.
fields.Subjective: Mr. Henderson attended appointment with case manager. Case manager confirms he takes risperidone 6 mg nightly via supervised administration at program, no missed doses. Despite reliable adherence, continues experiencing moderate symptoms. Reports daily auditory hallucinations of voices making negative comments. Endorses vague paranoid ideas about surveillance. Sleep disrupted at 5 hours nightly. Appetite fair, weight stable at 176 lbs. Attends day program irregularly. Not working, receives disability. Lives in group home. Limited social interaction. Mood 'the same' rated 4/10. Denies substance use. Flat during interview. Safety: No SI/HI. (Assessed by Jerome Washington, LMSW, Social Worker)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Middle-aged male, adequate grooming, appears withdrawn

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Lives in group home; unemployed, on disability; minimal engagement; case management services.
Assessment_and_Plan: Will consider dose increase or medication change.
fields.Author: Note written by Jerome Washington, LMSW, Social Worker — Group Living Network, 5623 Community Drive, Atlanta, GA 30318, Phone: (555) 661-3487, Fax: (555) 661-3488
